headline: Investors Are Betting on Boeing’s Turnaround Even as Quality Questions Linger
summary: The most prolific name in aeromanufacturing, Boeing (NYSE:BA) shares fell 3.26% on March 10 after the company disclosed wiring flaws in undelivered 737 MAX jets caused by a machining error, and the stock is down 9.3% over the past month. Reddit sentiment shifted from neutral 58 on Tuesday evening to bullish 62 by Wednesday morning, ... Investors Are Betting on Boeing’s Turnaround Even as Quality Questions Linger

headline: Boeing’s New Israel Deal Highlights Defense Strength Versus Commercial Challenges
summary: Boeing (NYSE:BA) has signed a new US$289 million contract with Israel for precision guided munitions. The agreement expands Boeing's defense business at a time when its commercial aviation unit faces operational challenges and regulatory scrutiny. The contract involves direct defense sales to a key U.S. ally, adding to Boeing's international defense order book. For you as an investor, this development sits alongside a very different story in Boeing's commercial division, where the 737 MAX...
